name: Crunchy Cereal Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe dish, combine the margarine and brown sugar. Microwave on high for about 1 minute to melt the margarine.
2. Beat in the egg when the sugar mixture has cooled (about 5 minutes).
3. Add the shredded wheat, walnuts, and raisins. Stir until well mixed.
4. Pat into the bottom of a 5-inch square microwave-safe dish.
5. Microwave on High for 4-6 minutes. Let stand for at least 10 minutes before cutting into bars.
To prepare in a conventional oven:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together margarine and brown sugar. Beat in egg and add the rest of the ingredients.
3. Pat mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch square pan.
4. Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until the top is browned. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting into 18 bars.
